2605.04980.title: Conceptors for Semantic Steering
2605.04980.paper_summary: Activation-based steering provides control of LLM behavior at inference time, but the dominant paradigm reduces each concept to a single direction whose geometry is left largely unexamined. Rather than selecting a single steering direction, we use conceptors: soft projection matrices estimated from activations pooled across both poles of a bipolar concept, which preserve the concept's full multidimensional subspace. A geometric analysis shows the bipolar subspace strictly subsumes the single-vector baseline. We further show that the conceptor quota provides a parameter-free layer-selection diagnostic, predicting concept separability with Pearson correlations up to r=0.96 across three instruction-tuned models and three semantic dimensions. Beyond selection, conceptors admit a closed-form Boolean algebra (AND, OR, NOT): we evaluate conceptor compositionality on thematically related sub-concepts. Across a systematic five-axis design-space evaluation, conceptors match or outperform additive baselines at layers where concept subspaces are multi-dimensional while producing substantially fewer degenerate outputs. Conceptor steering is a geometrically principled, compositional, and practically safer alternative to single-direction steering from a limited number of contrastive pairs.
2605.04980.paper_summary_zh: 啟動基礎的引導在推理時提供了對大型語言模型行為的控制，但主導範式將每個概念簡化為一個單一方向，其幾何形狀大多未被檢視。我們不僅選擇單一的引導方向，而是使用概念器：從跨越雙極概念兩極的激活中估算的軟投影矩陣，這些矩陣保留了概念的完整多維子空間。一個幾何分析顯示，雙極子空間嚴格地包含了單向量基線。我們進一步顯示，概念器配額提供了一種無參數的層選擇診斷，預測概念可分性，皮爾森相關係數高達 r=0.96，涵蓋三個指令調整模型和三個語義維度。除了選擇，概念器還允許一種封閉形式的布爾代數（AND、OR、NOT）：我們在主題相關的子概念上評估概念器的組合性。在系統性的五軸設計空間評估中，概念器在概念子空間為多維的層級上匹配或超越加法基線，同時產生顯著較少的退化輸出。概念器引導是一種幾何原則的、組合的，並且在實際上更安全的替代方案，相較於從有限的對比對中進行的單向引導。
2605.04980.author: Ilias Triantafyllopoulos et.al.
2605.04980.authors: Ilias Triantafyllopoulos, Young-Min Cho, Ren Tao, Miranda Muqing Miao, Sunny Rai, Lyle Ungar, Sharath Chandra Guntuku, Neville Ryant, João Sedoc
